questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a Name 5 essential components of a settlement. 2.5 b What is the full form of ECBC and NBC? 2.5 c What are the 3 pillars of sustainable development? 2.5 d Write 3 key principles of inclusive design relevant for any settlement. 2.5 e What is the full form of TOD in settlement design? 2.5 f What is your understanding of urban form pertaining to a settlement? 2.5 g What is the tool/bye-law used by planners to control the population density in a settlement? 2.5 h What is the full form of UBBL? 2.5
“A city is a physical system with structured functional arrangement of physical elements.” Explain in detail with suitable exaples. 10
Explain the image structure of city as described by Kevin Lynch in his book “The Image Of The City”. 10
Draw neat labelled conceptual sketch of a major arterial road depicting all the elements and components of street design. 10
What are transit hubs in cities? What are the components of transit hubs that influence the effective and efficient functioning of these transit hubs? 10
Explain any 5 bye-laws/development codes from NBC or Model BBL and their respective purpose and applicability to achieving a healthy and sustainable urban form. 10
What is NBC? What is the purpose and scope of NBC? What are the principles the NBC is based on? 10
Explain TOD and mixed land use? What are their benefits to a settlement and its urban form? Give examples. 10

What is urban redevelopment? When and why does the need for urban redevelopment arise? What are the tools/policies used by planners to induce redevelopment in any existing city area? Give suitable examples to support your answer. 10
